'''Wxtm''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Wxtm system/Legends|Wxtm system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. One of its native creatures was an avian called a [[ravenscreecher]], which had six legs.

{{Planet-stub}}
